title: potentilla opaca var. humifusa
intro: Potentilla opaca var. humifusa, also known as low creeping cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Potentilla opaca var. humifusa include its potential to treat various conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Potentilla opaca var. humifusa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the affected area.
